svg.text: The Sunday analysis day: pre-registered re-reads of the sprint data — no GPU
each one re-reads what the sprint scripts persist anyway: per-item, per-order raw probe reads, judge taste per round, per-round adapters with merged deltas
Gates first, then contrasts — and drift-field language only where the design identifies it
Weight geometry, recomputed on merged updates
Candidate-level judge loading replaces the assumed mediator — judgment_taste is demoted
